description: Production-ready React + TypeScript + Vite + Chakra UI v3 template with dark/light mode

steps.title: Update project name
steps.description: Replace 'focusflow' with your project name in package.json and components

steps.title: Customize theme colors
steps.description: Edit src/theme/index.ts and update semantic token colors for your brand

steps.title: Add components
steps.description: Create new components in src/components/ using Chakra UI components

steps.title: Extend semantic tokens
steps.description: Add custom tokens to src/theme/tokens/semantic.ts for light/dark mode support
